personas.name: Hopeful Mental Health Seeker
personas.description: A user seeking mental health support and hopeful for positive change.
pain_points: Previous negative experiences with mental health support
constraints: Needs to feel hopeful and motivated

personas.name: Frustrated Technical User
personas.description: A user experiencing technical difficulties with the app.
context: Needs a stable and functional app

personas.name: Disappointed User
personas.description: A user with a negative experience with the app.
goals: Find an effective mental health solution

personas.name: Language-Constrained User
personas.description: A user seeking support in their native language.
goals: Access mental health support in their native language
pain_points: Difficulty finding support in their native language

personas.name: Appreciative User
personas.description: A user who appreciates the app's content and features.
pain_points: Some limitations in the app's content
constraints: Values the app's content and features

personas.name: Suggestive User
personas.description: A user with suggestions for improving the app.
goals: Improve the app's features and support
pain_points: Some limitations in the app's features
context: Actively using the app and seeking improvement
constraints: Seeking a more effective and supportive app

personas.name: Mental Health Seeker
personas.description: A user seeking effective mental health support.

personas.name: Comparative User
personas.description: A user comparing the app to other therapies.
context: Researching and evaluating mental health options
constraints: Needs to evaluate the app's effectiveness

personas.name: Monetization-Conscious User
personas.description: A user concerned about the app's monetization.
goals: Evaluate the app's value for money
Make an informed decision about subscription
pain_points: Seeking a fair and transparent monetization model
context: Evaluating the app's features and pricing
Seeking a reliable and affordable solution
constraints: Needs to feel that the app is a good value
Seeking a fair and transparent monetization model

personas.name: Long-Term User
personas.description: A user seeking long-term support and effectiveness.
pain_points: Some limitations in the app's long-term effectiveness
context: Actively using the app over an extended period

personas.name: Feature-Specific User
personas.description: A user seeking specific features or functionality.
pain_points: Some limitations in the app's features
context: Actively using the app and seeking specific features
constraints: Seeking a more effective and supportive app
